metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Agent Event ASIM parser for Anthropic Claude Compliance
properties.query:
let Parser = (
    disabled: bool=false,
    pack: bool=false
)
{
    BV_ClaudeCompliance_ComplianceActivities_CL
    | where not(disabled)
    | where type_CF != 'compliance_api_accessed' //filter out API requests for logs
    | project-rename
        EventStartTime = created_at,
        EventUid = _ItemId,
        EventOriginalUid = id_CF,
        EventType = type_CF
    | extend
        EventSchema = 'AgentEvent',
        EventSchemaVersion = '0.1.0',
        EventCount = toint(1),
        EventVendor = 'Anthropic',
        EventProduct = 'Claude Enterprise',
        TargetAgentId = coalesce(claude_project_id, claude_chat_id),
        EventEndTime = TimeGenerated
    | evaluate bag_unpack(actor)
    | project-rename
        ActorUserId = user_id,
        SrcIpAddr = ip_address
    | extend
        ActorUsername = coalesce(email_address, unauthenticated_email_address),
        ActorUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(coalesce(email_address, unauthenticated_email_address)), 'UPN', '')
    | extend AdditionalFields = iff (
        pack,
        bag_pack(
            'request_id', request_id,
            'request_method', request_method,
            'status_code', status_code,
            'url', url,
            'claude_chat_id', claude_chat_id,
            'claude_file_id', claude_file_id,
            'claude_project_id', claude_project_id,
            'user_agent', user_agent
        ),
        dynamic({})
    )
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        Type,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventUid,
        EventOriginalUid,
        EventType,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventCount,
        EventVendor,
        EventProduct,
        TargetAgentId,
        ActorUserId,
        SrcIpAddr,
        ActorUsername,
        ActorUsernameType,
        AdditionalFields,
        EventResult = 'Success',
        Dvc = SrcIpAddr
};
Parser
(
    disabled = disabled,
    pack = pack
)
